hard.description: Each team must have at least 3 days between consecutive fixtures
Two teams from the same city cannot both have home games on the same day
No fixtures scheduled during international break windows
Every team plays every other team exactly twice (once home, once away)
A team can only appear in one fixture per slot
A ground can host at most one game per slot

soft.description: Teams should not have more than 3 consecutive away games
Teams should not have more than 3 consecutive home games
Derby fixtures should be at least 8 rounds apart (first vs second leg)
Teams with European fixtures mid-week should get extra rest before next league game
Teams should have roughly equal home and away games in each half of the season
A team should not face the same opponent in both a cup and league game within 4 weeks

preferences.description: High-profile derbies should be placed in TV primetime slots
All 20 teams should have a fixture on Boxing Day and New Year's Day
Matchday 1 should include at least one high-profile fixture
